# terrible_community_docker_docker_compose_v2_pull (Data Source)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this data source against

### Optional

- `ignore_buildable` (Boolean) If set to `true`, will not pull images that can be built.
- `include_deps` (Boolean) If set to `true`, also pull services that are declared as dependencies. This only makes sense if `services` is used.
- `policy` (String) Whether to pull images before running. This is used when `docker compose up` is ran. `always` ensures that the images are always pulled, even when already present on the Docker daemon. `missing` only pulls them when they are not present on the Docker daemon. This is only supported since Docker Compose 2.22.0.
- `services` (String) Specifies a subset of services to be targeted.

### Read-Only

- `actions` (String) A list of actions that have been applied.
